{{/* Right-side "On this page" navigation for product: crds pages. Builds an alphabetically sorted list of CRD kind names with anchor links. */}} {{ $crdFiles := $.Site.Data.apis.crds }} {{ $kinds := slice }} {{ range $plural, $dirContents := $crdFiles }} {{ if $dirContents.definition }} {{ $kinds = $kinds | append $dirContents.definition.spec.names.kind }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ $sorted := sort $kinds }} On this page
    {{ range $sorted }}
  • {{ . }}
    • {{ end }}
